email_body:
Beste mevrouw/heer,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Digital Marketing & Communications Officer bij de Marie Curie Alumni Association. Uw missie om een wereldwijd netwerk van onderzoekers te ondersteunen sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring in digitale marketing en mijn technische achtergrond.

Bij Episto voer ik on-page SEO uit, schrijf ik keyword-gerichte content en beheer ik WordPress-sites. Daarnaast heb ik op mirook.com gestructureerde data en GEO-technieken toegepast om zichtbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren. Ik ben gewend om met tools zoals SEMrush, Ahrefs en Google Analytics te werken en kan snel nieuwe platforms oppakken.

Hoewel mijn Nederlands nog B1 is, volg ik lessen om dit verder te verbeteren. Ik werk in het Engels en Turks en ben gemotiveerd om bij te dragen aan de communicatiedoelen van MCAA.

Ik voeg mijn CV en motivatiebrief bij en hoop op een gesprek.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Madam/Sir,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Digital Marketing & Communications Officer position at the Marie Curie Alumni Association. Your mission to support a global network of researchers aligns perfectly with my experience in digital marketing and my technical background.

At Episto, I handle on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted content, and manage WordPress sites. Additionally, on mirook.com I have applied structured data and GEO techniques to improve visibility in both traditional and AI-powered search engines. I am comfortable using tools like SEMrush, Ahrefs, and Google Analytics, and I can quickly learn new platforms.

Although my Dutch is still B1, I am taking classes to improve further. I work in English and Turkish and am motivated to contribute to MCAA's communication goals.

I have attached my CV and cover letter and look forward to the opportunity to discuss my application.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste selectiecommissie,

Toen ik de vacature voor Digital Marketing & Communications Officer bij de Marie Curie Alumni Association zag, voelde ik direct een sterke connectie. Uw organisatie verbindt onderzoekers wereldwijd en ondersteunt hun carrière – een missie die ik graag wil versterken met mijn digitale marketingvaardigheden.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor on-page SEO, het schrijven van blogcontent en het beheren van WordPress-sites. Ik werk dagelijks met SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics en Search Console om prestaties te meten en te optimaliseren. Daarnaast heb ik op mijn eigen project mirook.com gestructureerde data (JSON-LD schema), entity-optimalisatie en GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) toegepast. Dit heeft me geleerd hoe content zichtbaar kan worden in zowel traditionele zoekmachines als AI-gestuurde platforms – een vaardigheid die steeds belangrijker wordt voor organisaties zoals MCAA.

Uw vraag naar ervaring met contentmanagement, sociale media en rapportage sluit aan bij mijn dagelijkse werk. Ik heb sociale media-integratie toegepast op websites en kan overzichtelijke rapporten opstellen. Hoewel mijn Nederlands nog op B1-niveau is, ben ik gemotiveerd om dit te verbeteren en werk ik vloeiend in het Engels en Turks.

Wat mij aanspreekt in MCAA is de internationale, wetenschappelijke omgeving. Ik ben leergierig, flexibel en gewend om zelfstandig te werken in een remote setting. Ik zou graag mijn technische en creatieve vaardigheden inzetten om de zichtbaarheid en betrokkenheid van uw netwerk te vergroten.

Ik hoop u in een gesprek meer te vertellen over hoe ik kan bijdragen aan MCAA.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok

--- English version ---

Dear Selection Committee,

When I saw the vacancy for Digital Marketing & Communications Officer at the Marie Curie Alumni Association, I felt an immediate connection. Your organization connects researchers worldwide and supports their careers – a mission I would love to strengthen with my digital marketing skills.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I am responsible for on-page SEO, writing blog content, and managing WordPress sites. I work daily with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, and Search Console to measure and optimize performance. Additionally, on my own project mirook.com, I have applied structured data (JSON-LD schema), entity optimization, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). This has taught me how content can become visible in both traditional search engines and AI-driven platforms – a skill increasingly important for organizations like MCAA.

Your need for experience with content management, social media, and reporting aligns with my daily work. I have integrated social media into websites and can produce clear reports. Although my Dutch is at B1 level, I am motivated to improve and I am fluent in English and Turkish.

What appeals to me about MCAA is the international, scientific environment. I am eager to learn, flexible, and used to working independently in a remote setting. I would love to apply my technical and creative skills to increase the visibility and engagement of your network.

I hope to tell you more in an interview about how I can contribute to MCAA.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
cv_highlights:
- On-page SEO, keyword research, and content writing for client websites at Episto
- WordPress site building and maintenance using Elementor and Astra theme
- Structured data (JSON-LD schema) and GEO/AEO implementation on mirook.com
- Proficient in SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Search Console, and Google Ads
- B1 Dutch with active language classes; fluent in English and Turkish
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
